title: Add upcoming events
description:
Please add the following upcoming events on the site please.
https://superiorcomfortinc.com/events/

Halloween Walkabout 
Sunday, October 26, 2025 @1:00pm to 3:00pm
Downtown Bristol, RI

Family-friendly Halloween walkabout. Join us for treats and fun!

Image: still waiting for the one we can use

Community Aid Drive
November 2025 (month-long)
11 Broadcommon Rd Bristol, RI 02809

We're hosting a community aid drive with the Ladies Auxiliary of the Bristol Fire Department! Drop off new, unwrapped toys, gift cards, or cozy PJs of any size (kids and adults) at our office through December 12th. Let’s come together and make this holiday season brighter for those in need! Feel free to stop by the office anytime between 8 a.m. and 3 p.m. during the week—there’s a drop-off box located in our foyer!

Kickoff to Christmas
Saturday, November 29, 2025 @ 5pm to 7pm  
Jacky's Galaxy 
383 Metacom Ave, Bristol, RI 02809
 
Please join The Ladies Auxiliary Of The Bristol Fire Department for a fun filled family event! Jacky’s will come alive for this magical night. Be sure to arrive at 5 pm to see Santa’s Grand Entrance! Live music by Jon Tyler, balloon artists, face painters, arts and crafts and a pastry buffet!

We will be collecting unwrapped toys, new pjs (all sizes) , gift cards and non perishable food items! All donations go back into the community!

Giving Day 
Saturday, December 13, 2025

We will be working with the Ladies Auxiliary of the Bristol Fire Department to organize and distribute the gifts from the Community Aid Drive

Thanks!

title: Update text on the page
assignees: Anna Polishchuk, Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Predrag
description:
Request: please update some if the texts from their homepage. More details below:
URL: https://superiorcomfortinc.com/

1. Update title and text for this section:
Title: Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical
Text: 
Our mission is to deliver world-class service and genuine satisfaction to both our customers and employees. We provide outstanding value, high‑quality installations, and expert service across residential HVAC, plumbing, and electrical systems. Through a positive atmosphere and combined team effort, we strive to make a meaningful impact in our communities.

With reasonable rates, flexible appointments, deep expertise, and an unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction, Superior Comfort Inc. stands above the rest. We offer long-term solutions to keep your family safe, comfortable, and stress-free—no matter the weather or situation. 


2.  Also update title and text for this section: 
Title: Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electrical Services
Text:
Our expertise now spans HVAC systems, plumbing, electrical, and IAQ solutions—designed to create healthier, more efficient homes.

From designing and installing new systems to replacements, essential upkeep, and expert repairs, our skilled technicians ensure top-tier craftsmanship and long-lasting performance. We’re dedicated to delivering industry-leading quality that homeowners expect and trust.

Have questions or goals for your home? Don’t hesitate to reach out. Our highly educated, extensively trained team thrives on enhancing your comfort, safety, and property value—no matter the service you need.



---
Thanks!

title: Update content in the About Us page
assignees: Anna Polishchuk, Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Predrag
description:
Request: seeking help update the content in their About Us page. 1st block only.
Page link: https://superiorcomfortinc.com/about-us/


Content to use:
At Superior Comfort Inc., we specialize in providing top-tier HVAC, electrical, and plumbing services across Rhode Island and Southern Massachusetts. While many contractors offer a broad range of services, we focus on delivering exceptional quality in each area:
  • HVAC Services: We offer comprehensive heating, cooling, and air quality solutions, including the installation, repair, and maintenance of gas, electric, and oil systems.
  • Electrical Services: Our licensed electricians provide a full spectrum of electrical services, from installations and repairs to safety inspections and smart home integrations.
  • Plumbing Services: We offer a wide range of plumbing services to keep your systems running smoothly and efficiently.
Our technicians are certified professionals who work alongside seasoned experts to meet the high standards of Superior Comfort. No company in Rhode Island offers higher quality or finer craftsmanship. Our reputation for top-notch services and products, coupled with our reliability and accountability, has been our strength for years, and we continue to build on this every single day.

Today's homeowners and business owners seek more efficient, less wasteful heating, cooling, and electrical solutions, all while maintaining the same level of dependability they've enjoyed for years. At Superior Comfort, we are committed to meeting these needs with innovative and sustainable solutions. 

Thanks!

Link: https://superiorcomfortinc.com/events/
 
Ribbon Cutting Ceremony - Wednesday, 7/16/25 @ 5:00pm to 7:00pm
11 Broadcommon Rd, Bristol, RI 02809
 
Join us at our office for the grand ribbon-cutting ceremony and be among the first to see our updated branding! Though we’re still Superior Comfort at our core, our new look is ready to greet you. There will be a food truck, music, custom decorated Oreos to enjoy, new swag to bring home and so much fun! Bring your family and friends!
 
Image to use:


Thanks!

title: Add BBB badge
description:
Please assist in adding to the site:

Site: https://superiorcomfortinc.com/areas-served/

Add to the below section site wide:


<!-- BEGIN: BBB AB Seal -->
<script type="text/javascript">
 var bbb = bbb || [];
 bbb.push(["bbbid", "boston"]);
 bbb.push(["bid", "118535"]);
 bbb.push(["chk", "465B7E3027"]);
 bbb.push(["pos", "bottom-right"]);
 (function () {
    var scheme = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://" : "http://");
    var bbb = document.createElement("script");
    bbb.type = "text/javascript";
    bbb.async = true;
    bbb.src = scheme + "seal-boston.bbb.org/badge/badge.min.js";
    var s = document.getElementsByTagName("script")[0];
    s.parentNode.insertBefore(bbb, s);
 })();
</script>
<!-- END: BBB AB Seal -->

title: New pages required for launch on Tuesday...
description:
Hi , here are the new service pages that Superior Comfort want written and launched on the launch date of next Tuesday. Can this be done by AI in time? I quoted for 500+ words but of course it is up to you how many you think you need. We'll need images as well but AI-generated images would likely suffice. We can also use any image or written content from any of the other Apex sites to hurry this along if need be, just need to change alt tags and image metadata.

If possible we'll need them written by Monday so that the Dev team can upload them and add them to the menu on Tuesday.

----------

Pages needed:
  1. Duct Cleaning
  2. Main Drain Services
  3. Kitchen, Bathroom & Shower Fixture Replacements
  4. Kitchen, Bathroom & Shower Fixture Repairs
  5. Kitchen, Bathroom & Shower Fixture Installations
  6. Water Quality Testing
  7. Water Filtration System Installs
  8. Electrical Repairs
  9. Electrical Installations
  10. Electrical Safety Inspections
  11. Ceiling Fans
  12. Circuit Breaker & Rewiring
  13. EV Charging Stations
  14. Generators
  15. Indoor & Outdoor Lighting
  16. Smart Home Products
  17. Surge Protectors

title: Superior Comfort Site New pages
description:
Hi,

Seeking help. The client mentioned that they are planning to add new service pages to the Superior Comfort site. Below is the list of pages:
  • Sewer Line Replacement or Repair
  • Septic System Installation or Replacement / Leach Field / Drain Field Installation
  • Dry Well Installation
  • Exterior Drainage (French drain systems, Exterior foundation drainage, Sump pump discharge lines)
  • Sewer Ejector Pumps
  • Buried Gas Line Installation
 
Can this be covered by the content budget?
Also may we have the timeline that we can provide to the client?

Thanks much!

CC
